01

About Me

I've never taken a role for the title. Every move I've made has been towards something I genuinely believe in — and marketing has always been my lens for that belief.

From understanding what a car means to its owner, to why someone chooses a healthcare brand in a moment of vulnerability, to how sport becomes identity and community — I've spent close to a decade studying what truly moves people and building strategies around that understanding.

I'm a natural storyteller, a community builder at heart, and someone who finds as much meaning in the human conversation behind a campaign as in the numbers it delivers. I believe the strongest marketing is the kind that makes people feel like they belong to something.

On a personal mission, I remodelled and completely automated my family business, which now requires minimal manual intervention, functioning as passive revenue while I focus on my deeper passions.

I'm currently diving deeper into the rapidly-evolving landscape of AI and consumer culture — the spaces I believe will define the next era of human civilisation and the success of brands.

Based In (But Not Limited To)
Chennai, India
Professional Experience
8+ years across 8 industries
Current Role
Director and Chief Operating Officer, Ind Rasayan Private Limited
Primarily Seeking
Senior Marketing roles at the intersection of consumer culture & AI, or anywhere in between

Sep 2020 — Mar 2022
Social Media Manager → Head of Marketing

Nov 2019 — Nov 2020

Manufacturing · GTM Strategy · 2025
Successful Business Model Pivot
Ind Rasayan Private Limited

Manufacturing · Partnership & Revenue · 2025

Ind Rasayan Private Limited
